architecture_complexity.rationale: Monolithic 1-Tier COBOL/AIX mainframe — hardest to modernize

key_risk_factors: COBOL codebase requires specialist knowledge; talent pool shrinking
AIX 7.2 platform EOL with no security patch path
No CI/CD pipeline — manual deployment increases risk
No application server — tight coupling between OS and application
Oracle 19c license cost and impending EOL (2027)
1-Tier architecture tightly couples presentation, logic, and data
modernization_notes: ERPApp-001 represents the most complex modernization challenge in the portfolio. COBOL-to-modern-language rewrite or incremental strangler-fig pattern both require significant investment and carry high delivery risk.
